mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) AS reg_count FROM member WHERE TO_DATE(reg_date, 'YY/MM/DD') BETWEEN TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'MM') AND SYSDATE
SELECT COUNT(*) AS reg_count FROM member WHERE TO_DATE(reg_date, 'YY/MM/DD') BETWEEN TRUNC(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, -1), 'MM') AND LAST_DAY(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, -1))
SELECT NVL(SUM(amount), 0) FROM Transaction_log WHERE TO_DATE(reg_date, 'YY/MM/DD') BETWEEN TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'MM') AND SYSDATE
SELECT NVL(SUM(amount), 0) FROM Transaction_log WHERE TO_DATE(reg_date, 'YY/MM/DD') BETWEEN TRUNC(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, -1), 'MM') AND LAST_DAY(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, -1))

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM member_group mg JOIN group_morak gm ON mg.group_no = gm.group_no WHERE mg.status IN ('LEADER', 'MEMBER') AND TO_DATE(gm.reg_date, 'YY/MM/DD') BETWEEN TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'MM') AND SYSDATE

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM member_group mg JOIN group_morak gm ON mg.group_no = gm.group_no WHERE mg.status IN ('LEADER', 'MEMBER') AND TO_DATE(gm.reg_date, 'YY/MM/DD') BETWEEN TRUNC(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, -1), 'MM') AND LAST_DAY(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, -1))
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM visit_log WHERE visit_date BETWEEN TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'MM') AND SYSDATE
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM visit_log WHERE visit_date BETWEEN TRUNC(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, -1), 'MM') AND LAST_DAY(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, -1))
